title: Emoji in Board Group Titles
excerpt: Only certain emojis appear to be supported in Board Group Titles. Although you can insert any emoji, only a small few actually remain in the Group Title after the board reloads. All emojis appear to be maintained correct…

posts.author: jmarjenka (Joshua Marjenka)
posts.cookedHtml: Only certain emojis appear to be supported in Board Group Titles. Although you can insert any emoji, only a small few actually remain in the Group Title after the board reloads. All emojis appear to be maintained correctly in the Board name and the pulse name.
